# Decisions docs

This index is generated from markdown files in `docs/decisions`.

| [ADR-0003: Afenda tenancy as the only business workspace authority](./ADR-0003-afenda-tenancy-authority.md)                                | Tenants and Afenda memberships are canonical ERP workspace and audit jurisdiction; not neon_auth.organization or unmapped Better Auth org IDs.               |
| [ADR-0004: Identity authority — Better Auth user vs Afenda principal (identity_links)](./ADR-0004-identity-bridge-and-principals.md)       | Bridge authentication (public.user) and ERP principal (users) with identity_links; email match is migration-only fallback.                                   |
| [ADR-0005: Auth schema authority — public (self-hosted Better Auth) vs neon_auth](./ADR-0005-auth-schema-authority-public-vs-neon-auth.md) | public Better Auth tables are the live runtime auth store; neon_auth is non-authoritative for ERP and must not gain new workspace truth.                     |
| [ADR-0006: Session operating context (Better Auth) + audit resolution rules](./ADR-0006-session-operating-context.md)                      | Server-resolved session additionalFields for Afenda operating context; authorization still validates memberships; audit moves off inference-only resolution. |
